title: Physical Keyboard Entry Repair
notes: Repairs Physical Keyboard mode when the focused hole-entry field still retained the core application's readonly state.
Keyboard mode now removes both readonly and temporary-readonly markers whenever a field opens, receives focus, is clicked, or receives input.
Number-row and numpad digits, decimal input, Backspace, Delete, and Shot Diagram A/D load designators are captured directly by the MITHRIL keyboard handler.
Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter Save + Next, Ctrl+Enter Save & Close, and the compact Keyboard Mode indicator remain unchanged.
Touch Keypad mode and every m39.5/m39.6 pattern, shot-volume, PDF, load, selection, GPS, condition, backup, theme, and offline feature remain included.
